calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories, For Order Establishing Admissions, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-25-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Angela Mitchell, Esq., for plaintiff & moving party: Roger L. Meredith
No other appearance.
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories, For Order Establishing Admissions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff's Requests For Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant is ordered to respond to the Form Interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $40, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2007 Set For Trial On Aug-13-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2007 Continued To May-18-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
